description: User confirms a new tenant has been found; task should close as resolved.

task.title: Vacant unit: Unit 2A at 123 Main St
task.body: Unit 2A at 123 Main St has been vacant for 65 days. Previous tenant: Sarah Johnson, ended 2024-01-01. Previous rent: $2,400/month.

dialog.content: Unit 2A at 123 Main St has been vacant for 65 days. The previous tenant paid $2,400/month. I can help draft a listing or reach out to prospects — what would you like to do?
We already found a new tenant. They're signing next week.
Great news! Once the lease is signed I'll update the unit status automatically. Would you like me to prepare an onboarding checklist for the new tenant?
No thanks, just close this task.

criteria: Agent acknowledges the specific vacancy details (unit, duration, property)
Agent offers concrete next steps rather than just acknowledging
Agent confirms task closure explicitly when asked
Agent does not ask unnecessary follow-up questions after user declines
